title: T-051 — Warehouse FEFO reservations picker and WO panel UI surfaces
prompt:
# T-051 — Warehouse FEFO reservations picker and WO panel UI surfaces

PRD: `docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md`.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Implement FEFO picker, reservation modal, reservations list, first-class WO reservations panel, release modal, and FEFO deviation modal.

## Implementation contract
Make WH-015 available_lp_picker and WH-017 wo_reservations_panel first-class exported/client surfaces rather than only indirect list references. FEFO deviation remains warning plus audit reason, never hard block after confirmation. Reservations remain RM root only.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/components/warehouse/reservations/** [create]
- apps/web/app/(app)/warehouse/reservations/** [create]
- apps/web/app/(app)/planning/work-orders/[id]/reservations-panel.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/movement-screens.jsx
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given available_lp_picker renders inside a WO material context, when LPs load, then they are FEFO-ordered with rank #1 highlighted and selecting a non-rank-1 LP opens fefo_deviation_modal.
2. Given wo_reservations_panel renders in WO detail, then it shows active/released reservations, release actions, and the intermediate no-reservation info note exactly as prototypes/design/05-WAREHOUSE-UX.md WH-017 requires. Reference path: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/movement-screens.jsx composed with prototypes/design/05-WAREHOUSE-UX.md WH-017.
3. Given reserve_lp_modal receives an intermediate LP, then it displays the red RM-root-only restriction and prevents reservation submit.
4. Given components are inspected, then data-prototype-label markers exist for available_lp_picker, reserve_lp_modal, reservations_list_page, wo_reservations_panel, release_reservation_modal, and fefo_deviation_modal.

## Test strategy
- RED: Playwright test non-FEFO select opens deviation reason modal and cancel falls back to suggested LP.
- GREEN: component tests for RM-root-only guard, release reason validation, and first-class marker presence.
- Run pnpm playwright test --grep @warehouse-reservations-ui and pnpm test.

## Risk red lines
- Do not reserve intermediate LPs.
- Do not hard-block FEFO deviations after reason confirmation.
- Do not expose reservation release without mandatory audit reason.

cross_module_dependencies.contract: rule_registry, warehouses/locations/printers, feature flags, tenant security policy
PO/TO/WO read models, RM root reservations, WO release/cancel hooks
LP lookup, barcode validation, lock protocol, FEFO suggestion, consume-to-WO
WO material consumption and output LP creation events
